subcodes.first_line: O seekers of truth! I beseech the divine favors that the purpose of each one of you which is founded upon intention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالبان حقیقت از الطاف الهی میخواهم که مطلب هر یک از شما که مبتنی بر نیت
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @stories; anecdotes, @prayer for spiritual recognition
